name: Peanut Buttered Grain
recipeIngredient: 3 cups cooked kasha, brown rice, millet, or cracked wheat
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet and sauté onions for 5 to 7 minutes until lightly colored.
2. Add the grain and toss with a fork to break up clumps.
3. Add the soy sauce and peanut butter (whiz this in a blender first), and cook, stirring gently with a fork until hot and evenly blended.
Serves 4 to 6.
